title: EV (disambiguation)
content:
'''EV''' could mean:
*The modified [[Errant Venture/Legends|''Imperial II''-class Star Destroyer]]
*[[EV-series medical droid]]
**[[EV-A4-D]]
*[[EV-series supervisor droid/Legends|EV-series supervisor droid]] (Legends)
**[[EV-4D9]]
**[[EV-9D9/Legends|EV-9D9]]
**[[EV-9D9.2]]
**[[EV-7G7]]
**[[EV-A4-D/Legends|EV-A4-D]]
*[[EV-II]]
*[[EV-series supervisor droid]] (Canon)
**[[EV-9D9]]
*"Extra-vehicle", a term to describe a [[Pilot/Legends|pilot]] after ejecting from their ship.

{{Disambig}}
